S.FORM: Martynas Andriuškevičius sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 3, Martynas Andriuškevičius, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: martjnas~ɕ an*riu*ke*i*ius~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, martjnas~ɕ an*riu*ke*i*ius~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Martynas Andriuškevičius sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 3, Martynas Andriuškevičius, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: martjnas~ɕ an*riu*ke*i*ius~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, martjnas~ɕ an*riu*ke*i*ius~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
